title: AIVS Audit Log Entry
description: A single newline-delimited JSON (JSONL) row in an AIVS hash-chained audit log. Each row records one agent action with its inputs, outputs, cost, and chain hashes. Rows must be ordered by 'id' ascending. See AIVS v1.0 Section 4.

id.description: Row identifier. Monotonically increasing, 1-indexed. Must be sequential with no gaps.

session_id.description: Unique identifier for the session this row belongs to. Shared by all rows in the same audit_log.jsonl file.

action_type.description: Classification of the action performed. Default value is 'tool_call'. Implementations may define additional values.

tool_name.description: Namespaced identifier for the tool or action that was invoked (e.g., 'browser.navigate', 'browser.eval', 'browser.click').

inputs_json.description: JSON-encoded action inputs as a string. Sensitive keys (password, token, api_key, secret, key, authorization, bearer, credential, passwd, passphrase) MUST be replaced with '[REDACTED]' before storage. The inputs_json field is informational and is NOT included in the row hash computation.

outputs_json.description: JSON-encoded action outputs as a string. MAY be truncated (reference implementation uses 2000-character limit). The outputs_json field is informational and is NOT included in the row hash computation.

cost_cents.description: Cost of this action in cents (integer). Use 0 for free actions.

error.description: Error message if the action failed. Empty string ('') if the action succeeded.

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp at the moment the action was recorded, with fractional seconds (e.g., 1710252645.123456). This value is included verbatim in the row hash computation.

prev_hash.description: The row_hash of the immediately preceding row. Must be an empty string ('') for the first row (id=1). For all subsequent rows, must be the exact row_hash of row (id-1).

oneOf.description: Empty string for the first row only.
Lowercase hex SHA-256 hash of the previous row.

row_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of this row, computed as SHA-256('{id}:{session_id}:{action_type}:{tool_name}:{cost_cents}:{timestamp}:{prev_hash}'). Always 64 lowercase hexadecimal characters. See AIVS v1.0 Section 3.1.
